feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Fiori Application in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!!

Can i create a Fiori Application in SAP Public Cloud without using BTP (Business Application Studio)?

Thanks in Advance

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: How to utilize key user custom field "via CODE LIST" and "Custom Business Object"
entry.content:
Dear Product Experts,

I found two helpful blogs which states how to implement custom fields requirement.
I would like to clarify more how to utilize "CODE list via CDS view (developer extensibility)" and "Custom business object" options in case our customer wants to add their own custom fields in Accounting documents.

Technically, both option seems to be able to provide value help option by list. 

Key User Custom Fields: When to use what type of code list

Extensibility _how to implement Custom Fields using Coding Block business context in SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Thank you for your technical advice.
BR, Ai Takahashi

entry.title: BAdI for generating embedded XML files for e-invoices not released for Germany?
entry.content:
Hi colleagues, 

Could someone possibly advise me on the below question from my customer regarding their migration of Peppol Exchange Service to BTP? 

“Could you please briefly confirm that the BAdI for generating the embedded XML files for e-invoices in the Public Cloud has still not been released for Germany? 

This is about the following topic: Implementation Hints for Embedding Documents to the XML File | SAP Help Portal“ 

Thanks a lot in advance, 

Johanna

entry.title: S/4 HANA Cloud Public2402: How to enhance "Item data" within the "repair order" app in the launchpad
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

We are working on the newest version of S/4 HANA Cloud: Public edition version 2402 and would like to enhance the "item section" in the "display repair order" application within the launchpad (Application ID: "TBT116RPO")

The requirement is to add new custom columns within the item section, which can be manually modifiable by users and whose content should be controlled later on during the SAVE operation (when creating or updating a repair order):

 My main issue right now is adding these new columns with the custom data.

 

First, when checking the application itself, looks like this is not a fiori application build in with the UI5 framework, but rather with the "WCF" framework:

Application details in the fiori launchpad

This is confirmed with the documentation found in the fiori reference library, where this app seems not to be a fully Fiori application, but rather a "Web Client UI application"

Application details within the fiori reference library

When trying the key user extensibility, in order to find the suitable "business context" to use to create new custom fields for the new columns to add at the "repair order item" level, somehow the key user extensibility tool does not provide a "plus +" icon (which normally opens directly the "custom fields and logic" fiori application with the suitable business context). The "Adapt UI" on the "repair order" application only seems to allow to move sections up and down: 

Key user extensibility not available at the repair order app?

Thus, I am wondering whether key user extensibility works on such Web UI applications, I guess not? am I wrong?

Since the key user extensibility "did not provide me" the direct access to the "custom fields and logic" app with the suitable business context, I started digging in SAP ADT and I felt like the I_ServiceDocumentItem data definition is the one "behind" the repair orders item list (service Object type = "BUS2000116") as shown in the example below: 

I_ServiceDocumentItem is the data definition behind the "Repair order" item screen

Based on this, I used the "custom fields and logic" app to create one new custom field "YY1_SrvItemDis" under the business context: "Service Item" which I have enabled on the "Service transaction item I_Service DocumentItem". This lead to extending the I_ServiceDocumentItem structure with a new custom field: 

Custom field added at the repair order item level

I was hoping that this first action will allow me to "add new custom data" at item level, for a repair order, which now "only" needs to be shown in the launchpad app "display repair order".

Is this first action am taking correct to fuflill my requirement? Will I be able by following these steps to add the new custom field "YY1_SrvItemDis" as a new column in the item level at the "repair order" screen? Will this require from me to extend "R_ServiceDocumentItemTP" or maybe "C_InhRepairOpenRepairOrderItem" or maybe both? Or am I going into an incorrect direction?

Is my requirement "feasible" in a S/4 HANA Cloud public edition environment?

Thank you all in advance

entry.title: Is it possible to obtain the monthly SalesOrder amount
entry.content:
Is it possible to use CDSView to extract the increase/decrease in the SalesOrder amount in a specified month as the order amount history?
An example data is as follows.
April registration SONumber: A Details: 00001  1,000,000 (JPY) → April order amount: 1,000,000 (JPY)
 May change     SONnumber: A Details: 00001  1,100,000 (JPY) → May order amount:   100,000 (JPY)
June change     SONnumber: A Details: 00001     900,000(JPY) → June order amount: - 200,000(JPY)

Is there a way to achieve this using standard functionality or InApp extension?

entry.title: Shipment Functionality
entry.content: I'd like to know if SAP public cloud now have shipment functionality.

entry.title: How can we do error handling in an interface on public cloud where integration is done on APIgee?
entry.content: We have a client requirement where we are trying to integrate third party systems with SAP S/4 cloud using APIgee as middleware. How can we do error logging, reporting and reprocessing?

entry.title: Question about report for Sales in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition - Out of the box reports or CDS
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a requirement from customer for Sales LOB reports that they wanted to have a report that shows the product cost price which is maintained on the material master level and also the sales price of a material. I tried to look up out of the box reports given by SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud for Sales, couldn't actually find one and also tried to look for the standard CDS Views but couldn't find one specific to what client ASK is.

Experts out there please provide some guidance on the above.

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales 

Thanks!

entry.title: Restrict Remit To field in BN Invoice
entry.content:
My client utilises SAP Business Network & SAP Ariba SLP. They have encountered situations where their suppliers are updating their banking details in the Remit ID on the Business Network instead of in their SLP profile.

Is there a way to restrict these fields in BN?

Or Is there a way to map the remit to information in BN to update in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud?

SAP Business Network for Procurement and SAP Business Network for Supply Chain SAP Business Network for Suppliers SAP Ariba Supplier Lifecycle and Performance SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Ariba to SAP S4HANA Cloud Integration Supplier Masterdata Standard Field Mapping
entry.content:
Hello!

We have a requirements to provide standard field mapping for supplier masterdata from Ariba to S4HANA Cloud. Do we have any documentation or anything for this item?

Thank you!

entry.title: Customization of Sales Order screen based on material type in cloud (SAP ABAP).
entry.content:
Hii Community,

How do I customize the sales order screen based on the material type given . I have created some custom fields out of which some are related to type "A" and some are related to type "B". I need to make sales order screen such that Custom Fields related to Type "A" should appear when a particular Material Type is selected and similarly for Type "B" . 

Thanks

Shraddha yak

entry.title: material plan price API
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We need to enter plan price to materials as mass upload. We tried to find API but couldn't find. Do you know any API for entering  plan price or standard screen as mass upload ?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: How to check if a note is applied in S4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is it possible to access a tile in Fiori Launchpad similar to the SNOTE transaction to check if a note is applied in S4HANA Public Cloud?

Regards,

Jonathan

entry.title: Unable to add the event filters in the Event Enablement Channel
entry.content:
Hello,

We have been trying to add the filters in the event channel in S4HANA Public Cloud but the add filter option isn't available for the outbound topic we have created.

Can someone help us is it with the role issue? Or those outbound topics doesn't have the filters to setup, providing the screenshot FYR

 

Thanks

Sandeep

entry.title: How to use aggregated value of a Z Condition Type automatically update into a Z Amount Field.
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have a Z condition type and I would like to know how to aggregate value in the header level which should be update automatically in the header of a rebate Z condition type.  However our aggregation has been achieved in the header level in standard way, unfortunately presently we aren't able to automatic update in the Header rebate condition type Zcustom. Currently it's not updated in the amount field.

Thank you.

entry.title: Question about notification in SAPS/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

There is a requirement from customer for example, when the new products are being added into SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, how would the customer be notified they have to add the price to the added materials and also the sales price to it?

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales MM (Materials Management) SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks,

entry.title: CDS View in ABAP Development Environment Eclipse is showing authorizationerror in test system Public
entry.content:
Dear expert,

We have created a CDS view in the ABAP Development Environment eclipse and deployed the same in our SAP Public Cloud 2402 development system, it is working fine in the development system but as we move to the test system it is showing the error in the screenshot below.

Please guide us.

entry.title: Clearance by virtual account of summary invoices
entry.content:
I would like to match a customer with a virtual account number for a summary invoice, which is a Japan-specific requirement, and make a Clearance.

1) We would like to know where to find the virtual account number on the bank statements.

2) Is it sufficient to set the virtual account number only in the BP master and the virtual account management application (F2089)?

entry.title: No authorization to create tasklist for plant (general maintenance)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am facing this issue in the Create Task List app.

When the user is going to create task list, receive the error message: "No authorization to create tasklist for plant XXXX"

I´ve check Maintain Workforce and Maintain Business User apps and they seem to be ok.

Any ideas?

Thanks so much in advanced.

entry.title: What is the CDS view to display plant address in the billing document printout
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Please help me to know what is the CDS view to display plant address in the billing document printout?
